assets.name: unique-equipment-icons-sheet
assets.revisedPrompt:
Create a single sprite sheet image: 6 columns by 3 rows, 18 equal square cells, each cell containing one centered fantasy RPG equipment icon, no text, no labels, no numbers. Use a consistent bright arcade fantasy survivor game style with cute chibi item icons, clean dark outline, high contrast, soft glow, dark dungeon palette, and gold unique-rarity framing around each icon. Top-down / 3-4 readable game icon perspective. Keep every icon visually distinct, same scale, centered in each cell, with no background scenery. Place exactly these item concepts in order left to right, top row then next row:
1) holy nail warhammer: silver hammer with glowing saint nail spikes and gold trim
2) thunder longbow: blue lightning bow with electric string
3) starfall arcane tome: purple spellbook with falling star and tiny black hole
4) plague bell: dark brass hand bell with green toxic mist and shadow aura
5) blazing core: fiery orange reactor orb with molten cracks
6) void lantern: black purple lantern with blue void flame
7) dragon ember heart: red dragon heart ember jewel
8) elite hunter boots: leather boots with gold wing motif and hunter marks
9) frost moon crown: icy silver crown with crescent moon
10) blood pact heavy plate: crimson heavy chest armor with blood rune
11) counterclockwise ring: bronze ring shaped like reversed clock hands
12) rose mirror: pink rose handheld mirror with lust aura
13) abyss mask: dark execution mask with violet eye slit
14) golem soul core: stone ring/core with rocky shield aura
15) demon broken horn: red black severed demon horn with flame
16) pale wheel ring: bone-white ring with ghostly phase aura
17) pilgrim dawn boots: holy white boots leaving golden road light
18) endless quiver: ornate quiver overflowing with spectral arrows

Important composition rules: each cell contains only the single requested item icon, no extra props beyond small thematic effects; maintain strong separation between cells; consistent padding; readable silhouettes; polished game asset look.

Background must be a solid uniform chroma key green: exactly #00B140, filling 100% of all pixels not occupied by icons. No gradient, no texture, no shadows on the background, no scenery, no ground, no decoration, no environmental elements. Pure flat color background. No text, no logo, no watermark.

assets.name: cultivation-class-roster
assets.revisedPrompt:
Polished Chinese xianxia cultivation fantasy character roster sheet for a game, wide 3 by 2 grid composition with exactly six isolated full-body heroes, one hero centered in each equal cell, clean dark ink-mist backdrop with subtle atmospheric swirls and clear separation between cells, no frames, no text, no logos, no watermark, no UI. Refined gongbi details blended with ink-wash atmosphere, consistent proportions, strong readable silhouettes, Eastern hairstyles and robes, no Western armor.

Top row left to right: (1) golden-robed muscular body cultivator, protective qi aura, jade prayer beads, powerful stance; (2) elegant jade-robed talisman daoist controlling floating paper seals and talismans, serene expression; (3) azure-robed flying-sword cultivator with three spirit swords orbiting, dynamic martial pose.
Bottom row left to right: (4) crimson-robed spirit enchantress wielding silk ribbons and lotus fire, dignified and non-explicit, graceful and powerful; (5) black-robed nether cultivator with crescent soul blade and ghost lantern, eerie yet refined; (6) bronze-and-teal mechanism sect cultivator controlling floating spiritual crossbows and formation disks, intricate mechanical motifs, no firearm.

All six figures isolated, fully visible head to toe, each centered in their own equal cell, harmonious palette, cinematic fantasy illustration, high detail, clean composition, no guns, no churches.

assets.name: cultivation-cover-landscape
assets.revisedPrompt: Cinematic Chinese xianxia cultivation fantasy key art for a survivor action game, wide landscape composition. Six distinct Eastern fantasy cultivator heroes stand across a celestial mountain platform above a vast sea of clouds: a powerful golden-robed sacred monk surrounded by protective qi, an elegant jade-robed mystic controlling floating talismans, an azure-robed sword cultivator commanding flying spirit swords, a swift ranger wielding luminous wind blades, a dignified crimson-robed holy maiden wielding lotus spirit fire, and a black-robed crescent-blade maiden surrounded by moonlit soul energy. Ancient sect gates and distant pagodas frame the background, with flying swords, jade energy currents, cinnabar fire, moonlit mist and a colossal celestial rift opening in the sky. Refined gongbi detail blended with dramatic ink-wash atmosphere, epic scale, strong readable silhouettes, polished premium game cover art. Keep the left third relatively calm and darker for an HTML menu overlay while keeping the heroes clearly visible across the center and right. No Western armor, no modern firearms, no churches, no UI. Wide composition, no text, no logo, no watermark.
